title: Proclamation No. 1502, s. 2008
text:
MALACAÑANG Manila

PROCLAMATION NO. 1502

DECLARING TUESDAY, JULY 1, 2008, AS SPECIAL (NON-WORKING) DAY IN SAN CARLOS CITY, NEGROS OCCIDENTAL

WHEREAS , Tuesday, July 1, 2008, marks the Charter Day Anniversary of San Carlos City;

WHEREAS , it is but fitting and proper that the people of San Carlos City be given full opportunity to celebrate the occasion with appropriate ceremonies.

NOW, THEREFORE, I, EDUARDO R. ERMITA , Executive Secretary, by authority of Her Excellency, GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO , do hereby declare Tuesday, July 1, 2008, as special (non-working) day in San Carlos City.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF , I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 9th day of MaY , in the year of Our Lord, Two Thousand and Eight.

By authority of the President: ( Sgd .) EDUARDO R. ERMITA Executive Secretary

By the Executive Secretary: ( Sgd .) JOAQUIN C. LAGONERA Senior Deputy Executive Secretary

Source: CDAsia
